summary: Set `c.NoCache = true` in the `watch` command so live polls don't get served stale data.
reason: The Atom getcurrent URL is constant across polls. With the client's 5-minute response cache active by default, the first poll seeds the cache and every poll within the 5-min window returns the same body — entries hit the dedup guard and emit nothing. A live-streaming command must never serve from cache.
